name: The sin of [[GREED]]
description:
Greed is larger than most other entities. It wears a golden business outfit with a glowing yellow tie and a golden crown that shines. Greed also holds a brown briefcase and a watch on his left wrist he always looks at when he is not chasing a player.

Greed can summon multiple dollar signs that have glowing auras.

Greed can turn items and replace them with a crystal. which it will charge up until firing projectiles in all directions when there’s something near it, though it’s easy to dodge or avoid.
creator: Y0ullN3ver_Kn0w
